response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON contained incorrect metadata, skipping the first song 'Nobishiro'. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded mismatched reference data and manually transcribed/translated 'Nobishiro' (00:00-01:54). Used reference lyrics for 'Bakamajime' (01:54-04:47). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed segments precisely to the vocal audio. Included the silent end title card 'Longiness' as a prominent visual event.

subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 良い年のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, act cocky, stay firm, and age gracefully

subtitles.original: 脂の乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらし無い身体
subtitles.english: A slovenly body in its prime with listless eyes

subtitles.original: 幸せの体感速度は早くなるばかり
subtitles.english: My perceived speed of happiness only gets faster

subtitles.original: 傷が癒えていく速度は遅くなるばかり
subtitles.english: The speed at which my wounds heal only gets slower

subtitles.original: 他人にお節介をしないのが今の俺の強み
subtitles.english: Not expecting anything from others is my current strength

subtitles.original: 手空いてでも進める距離なら行く 騙し騙し
subtitles.english: Even if I have to turn back, if it's a distance I can cover, I'll go, coaxing myself along

subtitles.original: 身の程を知る程に胸を張り いつも通り
subtitles.english: The more I know my place, the more I puff out my chest, as always

subtitles.original: でも時にしたって良い背伸び やっと大人げないができる歳
subtitles.english: But sometimes it's fine to reach high, finally at an age where I can be childish

subtitles.original: 小さな枠組みただの数字 縛られずにでも腹括り
subtitles.english: Small frameworks, just numbers, unbound but resolved

subtitles.original: あの日の俺が立ち止まる ほどにデカくそびえ立つ
subtitles.english: Towering so high that the me of that day would stop in his tracks

subtitles.original: 隅田川にかかる勝鬨橋を渡る
subtitles.english: Crossing the Kachidoki Bridge over the Sumida River

subtitles.original: 重なるスカイツリー 東京タワーと真ん中の頼りない背中
subtitles.english: Overlapping Sky Tree and Tokyo Tower, with my unreliable back in the middle

subtitles.original: サボり方とか甘え方とか逃げ方と言い訳の仕方とか
subtitles.english: How to slack off, how to depend on others, how to run away and make excuses

subtitles.original: やっと覚えてきた 身につけてきた 柔らかい頭
subtitles.english: I've finally learned and acquired a flexible mind

subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 良い年のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, act cocky, stay firm, and age gracefully

subtitles.original: 脂の乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらし無い身体
subtitles.english: A slovenly body in its prime with listless eyes

subtitles.original: 嫌われ方や慕われ方や叱り方とか綺麗なぶつかり方
subtitles.english: How to be disliked, adored, scolded, and how to clash beautifully

subtitles.original: 覚えたいことが山のようにある のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: There's a mountain of things I want to learn, I've got nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: Nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: Nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: Nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: 俺たちまだのびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We've still got nothing but room to grow

subtitles.original: ばかまじめ
subtitles.english: [Song: Bakamajime]

subtitles.original: くだんない話と
subtitles.english: Silly talk and...

subtitles.original: うざったい貴様と
subtitles.english: ...annoying you...

subtitles.original: なみなみの日々に
subtitles.english: ...are being poured...

subtitles.original: 注がれてく 怠いが溢れ出してく
subtitles.english: ...into ordinary days as laziness overflows

subtitles.original: 飯がまだ届かない
subtitles.english: My food hasn't arrived yet

subtitles.original: 仕事は片付かない
subtitles.english: My work isn't done

subtitles.original: うだつの上がらない毎日にため息ばかり
subtitles.english: Nothing but sighs in these unproductive days

subtitles.original: でまたド派手にすっころび
subtitles.english: And then I fall down spectacularly again

subtitles.original: 洗い立てのシャツにこぼすコーヒー
subtitles.english: Spilling coffee on a freshly washed shirt

subtitles.original: 前のめりその姿勢だけは褒めて良し
subtitles.english: At least praise my forward-leaning posture

subtitles.original: 肩落とす並木通り 増えた柄と差し色に
subtitles.english: Slumping shoulders along tree-lined streets, adding patterns and accent colors

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当嫌んなる毎日だ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm really fed up with these days

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: Or reluctantly wake up early

subtitles.original: その分素敵な何かが
subtitles.english: It's not like something wonderful...

subtitles.original: 訪れるとかそんなわけでもないのにさ
subtitles.english: ...will happen in return anyway

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうよな
subtitles.english: Yet here I am, working hard again today

subtitles.original: がむしゃら以外知らないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't know any other way than going reckless

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May blessings be upon clumsy, stubborn, and stupidly honest us

subtitles.original: 重くなってきた荷物をちょっと置いて立ち止まり
subtitles.english: Putting down my heavy load for a bit and stopping

subtitles.original: 昨日の事なんざ忘れちまえば同じ
subtitles.english: If I just forget about yesterday, it's all the same

subtitles.original: 浴びるday light 羽根伸ばし
subtitles.english: Basking in the daylight, stretching my wings

subtitles.original: それか月夜にこっそりと吐き出してしまえば良い
subtitles.english: Or quietly spitting it all out under the moonlight

subtitles.original: でもその前にアレとコレの話
subtitles.english: But before that, let's talk about this and that

subtitles.original: そのためには先ずはソレを片し
subtitles.english: To do that, first let's clean this up

subtitles.original: って今何時？いやその前に
subtitles.english: Wait, what time is it now? No, before that...

subtitles.original: 今日もなんだかんだ騒がしい毎度あり
subtitles.english: Somehow today is noisy again, thank you for your business

subtitles.original: 1ヶ月くらい何にも考えずだらだらしていたいな
subtitles.english: I want to laze around for about a month without thinking of anything

subtitles.original: ゆっくり休んで遊んで眠っていたいなって
subtitles.english: I want to rest up, play, and sleep, I think...

subtitles.original: 思う日もあるけれど
subtitles.english: There are days I feel like that, but

subtitles.original: やっとここまできたんだよ
subtitles.english: We finally made it this far

subtitles.original: ここじゃ終われないんだよ
subtitles.english: We can't end it here

subtitles.original: 辛いきついもいつかは笑い話にできると信じてるんだほら
subtitles.english: Believing that all the tough times will become a laughing matter someday, see?

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうからさ
subtitles.english: Because I'm going to work hard again today

subtitles.original: がむしゃらに愛を歌うからさ
subtitles.english: Because I'm going to sing about love recklessly

subtitles.original: 目一杯吸い込んだ空気 嗚呼本当素晴らしい毎日だ
subtitles.english: Taking a deep breath of air, ah, what a truly wonderful daily life

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: Or reluctantly wake up early

subtitles.original: ほんの少しの幸せに触れるだけで全部全部ありに思えるんだ...
subtitles.english: Just touching a tiny bit of happiness makes it all seem worth it

subtitles.original: 明日もまた頑張ってみようか がむしゃらに生きていくんだ
subtitles.english: Shall we try our best again tomorrow? We'll live recklessly

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May blessings be upon clumsy, stubborn, and stupidly honest us

subtitles.original: do my thing do your thing
subtitles.english: do my thing do your thing

subtitles.original: 肩の力を抜いて柔軟に
subtitles.english: Relax your shoulders and be flexible

subtitles.original: do my thing do your thing
subtitles.english: do my thing do your thing

subtitles.original: あと1ミリ背伸び
subtitles.english: Stretching just one more millimeter

subtitles.original: 嗚呼本当嫌んなっちゃうよな
subtitles.english: Ah, I really get fed up with it

subtitles.original: それでも今を生きている
subtitles.english: But we are still living in the present

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで馬鹿真面目なあなたに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May blessings be upon clumsy, stubborn, and stupidly honest you

subtitles.original: Longiness
subtitles.english: [Song Title: Longiness]
